metadata.description: Automates project analysis, task decomposition, project governance, progress tracking, and execution for large-scale complex tasks

plugins.name: spec-driven-develop
plugins.description: Two complementary AI agent skills: (1) Spec-Driven Develop — automates full development workflow for large-scale complex tasks: project analysis, task decomposition, project governance, progress tracking, and execution; (2) Deep Discuss — structured deep discussion for problem analysis, brainstorming, and solution design.
